column1: Hey Alexander, thanks for your interest in traveling with SpringBreak U by Go Blue Tours. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text shortly with info and details
What's good! It's Spiffy from SpringBreak U here
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options and deets
Cool I got you. which destination were you lookin to book
word Cancun is dope for sure. you'll def enjoy it
how many ppl in your group so far?
yea thats solid! you all from the same school?
wordd I've only heard good things about Maryland. had a friend from high school go there
y'all def know how to party lol
gonna put this info together for you rn, how soon were you lookin to get things booked?
okay bet ill send what we have rn at the moment but just a heads up things are moving quickly rn so pricing and availability may be diff mid Jan
ill add a payment plan and discount in there to help split things into two and make it easier for everyone
is it cool if I send most of the info through email? its a little long for text
dope whats the best email to send to
just sent that over lmk if it came through
Liked “just sent that over lmk if it came through”
What's the difference between the regular and party pass, do you need the party pass to be unlimited drinks at the nightclubs/bars on the resort?

nope so the base package comes with the all inclusive unlimited drinks and food on the resort. youre able to attend every event that happens on the resort as part of the main package. the party package youre seeing is for the off-resort nightclub events. those come with express entry, cover charge, and open bar at top nightclubs like D'Cave, Coco Bongo, Mandala, and more
sup bro hows the group feelin about the options so far
Good still getting a head count, do prices ever go up and if so how much and when
aight bet. yea they do its kinda hard for me to clock it kinda happens randomly
a lot of ppl booking right now so they go up then sell out
yerr whats good bro, just a heads up rooms are running low, did we want to make a move on that option?
Yeah so say I get 12 people together we would get a portal where we could book like 3 4 person rooms, or would each 4 person room get its own portal
i can send you over a reservation in a few, everyone can hop on the one portal
3 rooms of 4, we wanna do 4 or 5 nights?
4 nights but I don't have an exact number yet for the number of people
okay word. how many are ready to book as of now? we'll start there and then build on it
I got a group of 4 ready
word I'll set up the 4, and then as the others are ready we'll add them in afterward. that way you 4 are all set instead of waiting
Liked “word I'll set up the 4, and then as the others are ready we'll add them in afterward. that way you 4 are all set instead of waiting”
just emailed over the reservation. sent a breakdown on how to navigate through too but lmk if anyone needs help with that
Liked “just emailed over the reservation. sent a breakdown on how to navigate through too but lmk if anyone needs help with that”
We have another group of 4 ready
okay cool I'll add 4 more slots
were the original 4 able to get on?
That room should be filled now
word I see it! just need the deposits to actually secure it otherwise it'll clear
Could we also have more details about the party package. Like what clubs and any other details

yea for sure, party pass comes with express entry, cover charge, and open bar at our nightclub hosted nights off of the resort. the venues are D'Cave, Rakata, Mandala, Mandala Beach Club, Vaquita, Coco Bongo, and our Open Bar booze cruise
its $210 for the 3 event party pass. thats the sweet spot. but you can do anywhere from 1 to 5 nights out
So the 3 event gets us 3 nights of access to off resort clubs with no cover and open bar? And how does that work, we get bands or something?
yea once you get on site for check in with our onsite staff they get you situated with all of the tickets you need, choose which nights you want to go to, etc
yoo whats good brotha, did the other plan on getting their deposits in?
sup brotha, any update on the others? operations is gonna clear those rooms out if they don't see any activity
dont want you to lose those rooms
Could we also add another 4 person room
yea let me ask operations, its def tough for me to get it tho since there is a lot of people unpaid on the reservation rn, if they can get their payments in will make it easier
whats the word with the rest of the guys are they def rollin?
Yeah they are just slow with the payments
ok word, we def need them to get up to date if they are, dont want them getting removed
Ok so the new group is going to take the place of the previous group. I'll get them in that spot soon
Okay bet, which guys do we want to take out?
Should be Nate pierce and Ethan
Okay bet, how many ppl do we want to clear exactly? The 4 of them?
Yeah the group with me should be the same then a clear group of 4
sup bro! those spots are open
can we get the guys in your room deposited so they dont lose their spots
Liked “can we get the guys in your room deposited so they dont lose their spots”

Hows it going. Finishing up the deposits now. Ayden in the reservation is having a hard time accessing his account. He thinks he may have registered with the wrong email. Would it be possible for him to be removed from that room so he could rejoin and create an account with the right email. Or if there is another way to that would work
Hey man! I can check what email he used
Yeah thats the wrong email. Could that be removed then he could rejoin
he can just use that email to sign in and then change his email
Thanks got that worked out. I also have another 4 person room ready if you could add that
Bet bro, they ready to hop on rn?
that should be all open now!
yoo Alex that additional room we added got closed down. what happened to them
Yeah man sorry they fell through. Was trying to find a group to replace them but wasn't able to in time I guess. ill have the last three in the current groups finish payments
Aight cool yea bro if you find another group just lmk! I can get that open back up
hey man! any word on Ronald Edmund? he's the only one we're waiting on
yeoo Alexander whats good bro. when you can, can you let the rest of the group know to add their flight info onto their accounts
Liked “yeoo Alexander whats good bro. when you can, can you let the rest of the group know to add their flight info onto their accounts”
Hey in light of recent events in Mexico we were wondering what our options are. Would it be possible to change our reservation to your resort in the DR?
Yo! totally get the concern bro. We can def get you switched to Punta Cana at the same price if we want to swap
I'll actually be in Punta Cana too so you'd have me there as a rep
Yes could you swap our reservation to Punta Cana
And it's for the same dates correct
yea we can do that bro
Lmk when the new reservation is confirmed so we can change our flights
hey bro you available for a call? We had a bunch of things change through the afternoon yesterday. wanted to go through the current options and give you an update
I cannot call rn, I can 12:30 if needed

Hey man we are looking over our options rn, is there a way to get a further reduced rate for Punta Cana or another non Mexican resort? We're concerned because there is still a travel advisory for Cancun and reports of terrorism in the area according to the US-Mexico travel advisory

Hey man, totally understand bro. Just to clarify, Cancun is currently under a Level 2 advisory, which is "Exercise Increased Caution", which has been in place since August 2025. For reference, its the same level as like a France or Italy
The $400 Punta Cana rate is already a reduced revised package rate. Unfortunately we aren't able to lower it further
If things do change and the U.S. government were to officially restrict travel to Cancun, we'd immediately notify everyone and outline next steps
yoo did y'all wanna add any party pass tickets to your packages?
bet bet, just lmk if you want me to add it in and I got you
safe travels today fam! gonna be a lit week
Loved “safe travels today fam! gonna be a lit week”
